add_account_owners_admin_access.description: [DEPRECATED] If account_id is set, grant account owner team admin access to the new project. This flag is ignored, and assumed true.

base_port.description: New services in this project will use this value as a base when deriving their service port numbers. This allows new services to allocate predictable and specific service ports. If not provided during project creation a random base port is used.
base_port.title: Base value that new services in this project will use to derive their port numbers.

billing_address.description: DEPRECATED: use split address fields like company, address_lines, zip_code, city and state instead

billing_extra_text.description: [DEPRECATED] Extra text to be included in all project invoices

copy_from_project.description: Project name from which to copy settings to the new project

copy_tags.description: Copy tags from the source project. If request contains additional tags, the tags copied from source are updated with them.

country_code.description: [DEPRECATED] Two letter country code for billing country

tech_emails.description: List of project tech email addresses

use_source_project_billing_group.description: If set to true, use the same billing group that is used in source project. If set to false, create a copy of the billing group used in the source project with the same information. If new project is not being copied from existing one this option has no effect
use_source_project_billing_group.title: Use the same billing group that is used in source project.
